abstract: Searches for iOS apps to promote in a campaign.
overview:
## Discussion

Use this endpoint to search for iOS apps that you can promote in a campaign. You can use query parameters to fetch data. For more information, see the Use Query Parameters section of [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/using-apple-search-ads-api-functionality].

An app search returns your `adamId`, which you can use in [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Campaign] in addition to the `AppDownloaderCriteria` in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/TargetingDimensions] payload. You can apply targeting dimensions to ad groups using [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-an-Ad-Group] or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-an-Ad-Group] endpoints.



### Payload Example: Search for iOS apps

# Search for iOS apps

**Web Service Endpoint**

Searches for iOS apps to promote in a campaign.

## Discussion

Use this endpoint to search for iOS apps that you can promote in a campaign. You can use query parameters to fetch data. For more information, see the Use Query Parameters section of [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/using-apple-search-ads-api-functionality].

An app search returns your `adamId`, which you can use in [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-a-Campaign] in addition to the `AppDownloaderCriteria` in the [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/TargetingDimensions] payload. You can apply targeting dimensions to ad groups using [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-an-Ad-Group] or [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Update-an-Ad-Group] endpoints.



### Payload Example: Search for iOS apps
